channel.title: Boss Class
channel.description: The Economist — The Intelligence — Boss Class

item.title: Boss Class 6. The human defence
item.description: What's your unfair advantage over AI? In a future where computers can outperform humans at many tasks, where will people still have an edge? Andrew…

item.title: Boss Class 5. Closed problem spaces
item.description: Peering into the near future of AI: We can't know where AI will take us over the coming years. But it's certain that the technology will improve. In…

item.title: Boss Class 4. GenAI v Gen Z
item.description: Are entry-level jobs done for? AI has already transformed the recruitment process for graduates: AI-written job applications are flooding inboxes.…

item.title: Boss Class 3. The easy button
item.description: How can managers avoid the pitfalls of artificial intelligence? Workplace AI is littered with disappointments. But some bosses have already figured…

item.title: Boss Class 2. Feeling the vibe
item.description: What happens when everyone can code? Try your hand at coding with AI and you might feel like you can perform magic. But if even Andrew Palmer can…

item.title: Boss Class 1. Fat layer of humans
item.description: Can AI do my job? How should employees and bosses be using the technology right now? And how should all of us prepare for the future? Andrew…
